title: Honest Reviews
delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this review?
no_results_found: No results found for your query.
hero_subtitle: Every review is a real story that helps thousands of people make the right choice. Become part of an honest community.
search_placeholder: Search by city, address, service name...
categories_subtitle: Tell your story or learn someone else's.
cat_rent_desc: Reviews from tenants and landlords. Find out what awaits you: dirt, deception, or perfect neighbors.
cat_auto_desc: All about sellers and car services. Don't be fooled when buying or repairing a car.
cat_services_desc: Find trusted professionals and companies in your city or region.
step1_desc: Upload a ready-made video or photo, or record an interview up to 10 minutes directly on the site.
step2_desc: Your review will help others avoid problems. The "one account — one review" principle ensures fairness.
step3_desc: Likes and comments help find the most useful and truthful stories.
contact_content: If you have any questions or suggestions, please email us at:
registration_check_email: Registration almost complete! Please check your email and click the link to activate your account.
error_not_verified: Your account is not verified. Please check your email.
verification_success: Your account has been successfully verified! You can now log in.
email_verification_body: Hello! Please click this link to activate your account: {verification_link}
error_user_exists: Error: A user with this email already exists.
error_file_too_large: Error: File is too large. Maximum size is 50 MB.
error_password_too_weak: Password is too weak. It must be at least 8 characters long and contain at least one digit and one uppercase letter.
error_upload_limit_exceeded: You are uploading reviews too frequently. Please try again later.
error_review_already_exists: You have already submitted a review for this subject.
upload_file_label: Choose video or photo (up to 50 MB)
no_reviews_yet: You haven't uploaded any reviews yet.
no_reviews_in_category: There are no reviews in this category yet. Be the first!
login_to_comment: Login to leave a comment or like.
forgot_password_instruction: Enter the email you used to register, and we will send you a password reset link.
reset_email_sent: If a user with that email exists, a password reset link has been sent.
password_reset_success: Password changed successfully! You can now log in with your new password.
error_invalid_token: The password reset link is invalid or has expired.
email_reset_body: Hello! You requested a password reset. Please click this link to set a new password: {reset_link}
live_page_subtitle: The latest reviews from our community
email_new_comment_body:
Hello!

User {commenter_email} left a comment on your review "{review_title}":

{comment_content}

You can view the comment at the link below:

{review_link}
email_new_like_body:
Hello!

User {liker_email} liked your review "{review_title}".

You can view the review at the link below:

{review_link}
review_published_success: Your review has been successfully published!
review_moderation_pending: Thank you! Your review has been submitted for moderation and will appear online shortly.
error_access_denied: Access denied. You do not have administrator rights.
